title: Side Profile Illustration Inspired By Black White
sourceTitle: Side Profile Illustration Inspired By Black White
prompt: A side-profile illustration inspired by a black-and-white photograph of a woman with dark wavy hair framing her face. In both versions, she looks slightly upward and away from the viewer, touching her ear with her hand to emphasize a prominent, textured gold hoop earring with a small teardrop dangle. The original photograph utilizes selective coloring to highlight only the gold jewelry against a grayscale palette, while the illustrated version translates this scene into a clean, minimalist line art style with a warm white background, adding subtle pops of color through dark pink lipstick, soft pink blush, a solid black ribbed sweater, and a matching gold pendant necklace.
